headline: Atmos Energy Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Atmos Energy (NYSE:ATO) raised its fiscal 2026 earnings guidance after reporting higher first-half profit, citing rate increases, customer growth, benefits from Texas regulatory changes and stronger revenue from its Atmos Pipeline-Texas through-system business. headline: Citi Keeps Neutral Rating on Atmos Energy (ATO) While Raising PT
summary: Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE:ATO) is included among the 10 Best Inflation-Hedge Stocks to Buy for 2026. On May 8, Citi raised its price recommendation on Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE:ATO) to $191 from $182. It maintained a Neutral rating on the stock.
